description_long: This handbag features a vintage-inspired design with a structured, rectangular body and a metallic frame. The exterior is adorned with a large, detailed print of a reddish-purple leaf on a cream background, giving it a natural and artistic flair. The bag is equipped with a single, rigid metal handle attached to the top frame, which is ornately decorated with engraved patterns. The closure mechanism is a classic kiss-lock clasp, centrally positioned on the top frame for secure fastening. The sides of the bag are slim, emphasizing the compact and elegant silhouette. The overall appearance is both stylish and functional, suitable for carrying small personal items in an urban setting.
description: A vintage-style handbag with a metal frame, kiss-lock clasp, and a large reddish-purple leaf print on a cream background. It features a single ornate metal handle and a structured, compact shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large reddish-purple leaf print, ornate metal frame, and kiss-lock clasp with the handle upright.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the slim profile of the bag and the handle extending vertically, with the leaf print visible along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same leaf print and metal frame details, handle and clasp visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the continuation of the leaf print along the edge.
attribute_strap_type: single short rigid metal handle, non-adjustable, attached to the top frame with metal hinges
attribute_closure_mechanism: kiss-lock clasp located at the top center of the metal frame
attribute_decorative_elements: ornate engraved metal frame, large leaf print
attribute_pattern: large reddish-purple leaf print on a cream background
